economic_notes: Council is economically dependent on ISC and Government of NWT for major portion of revenue. Holds 1,035 of 4,004,150 limited partnership units in Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership (GILP), which holds 51% interest in Mackenzie Valley Construction Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Province is NT (Northwest Territories). Gwich'in Investments Limited Partnership is accounted for using modified equity method (GBE). No schedule of remuneration included in the document. Total government transfers calculated as ISC (290527) + Govt of Canada (96399) + Govt of NWT (190622) = 577548; Gwich'in Tribal Council (25595) and Nihtat Gwich'in Council (70000) treated as non-government transfers included in OSR. OSR = 850713 - 577548 = 273165 if tribal council contributions excluded from govt transfers, but tribal councils classified as other funders. Annual debt service not determinable as loan was new in 2021 with no principal repaid during year.
